_comment: Ground Truth Protocol — Claude Code Hook Configuration

SessionStart.name: ground-truth-probe
SessionStart.description: Injects current project state (database, services, git, credentials) into agent context at session start

PreToolUse.name: gate-no-duplicate-database
PreToolUse.description: Blocks database creation if database already exists

PreToolUse.name: gate-no-duplicate-table
PreToolUse.description: Blocks table creation if table already exists

PreToolUse.name: gate-no-deploy-without-tests
PreToolUse.description: Blocks deployment if tests have not passed in this session

PostToolUse.name: log-spec-reads
PostToolUse.description: Logs when design spec documents are read for spec-before-code verification

PostToolUse.name: warn-code-without-spec
PostToolUse.command: if [ ! -f .ground-truth/session.log ] || ! grep -q 'READ_SPEC:' .ground-truth/session.log 2>/dev/null; then echo 'WARNING: Writing code without reading a spec document first. Rule: Spec before code.'; fi
PostToolUse.description: Warns if source code is written without any spec having been read in this session
